script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
USERS="afrah aixa alejandro ashley axel cameron david emily jesusr jose lia neil neilc rosi stephanie zahid"
MASTER=/home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json
echo '=== BEFORE: inode + owner per per-user creds ==='
for u in $USERS; do stat -c "$u: inode=%i owner=%U:%G mode=%a" /home/$u/.claude/.credentials.json 2>/dev/null; done
echo '=== STEP 1: replace hard link with real per-user copy ==='
for u in $USERS; do
  dst=/home/$u/.claude/.credentials.json
  tmp="${dst}.migrating.$$"
  cp -- "$MASTER" "$tmp" && chown "$u:$u" "$tmp" && chmod 0600 "$tmp" && mv -f -- "$tmp" "$dst"
  echo "  $u: rc=$?"
done
echo '=== STEP 2: remove per-user accounts from azureuser group ==='
for u in $USERS; do
  gpasswd -d "$u" azureuser 2>&1 | head -1
done
echo '=== STEP 3: restore master credential to mode 0600 ==='
chmod 0600 "$MASTER"
stat -c 'master: %a %U:%G' "$MASTER"
echo '=== AFTER: inode + owner per per-user creds (should be DIFFERENT inodes, per-user owners) ==='
for u in $USERS; do stat -c "$u: inode=%i owner=%U:%G mode=%a" /home/$u/.claude/.credentials.json 2>/dev/null; done
echo '=== verify: per-user accounts no longer in azureuser group ==='
for u in $USERS; do groups "$u" 2>&1 | head -1; done
echo '===END==='
